title: Cherry Blossom Shrine
summary: Serene spring hillside shrine with cherry blossom petals drifting toward Mount Fuji.
prompt: A serene Japanese shrine on a hillside in full spring bloom. A small wooden torii gate in vermilion red, stone lanterns lining a moss-covered path, cherry blossom petals swirling in a soft breeze. Distant snow-capped Mount Fuji visible in the misty background, soft golden-hour light. Painterly traditional ukiyo-e meets modern illustration style. Tranquil, contemplative mood, no people. Wide landscape composition.
